name: Active Wallet Drain
description: Detects rapid outgoing transfers indicating an active drain attack (>10 tx/hour to same address)
author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Rapid outgoing transfers detected (>10/hour to same address) - active drain in progress

metadata.attack_scenario: Compromised wallet or AI agent being actively drained by attacker

name: Phishing Victim Pattern
description: Detects when 80%+ of transfers go to same address, indicating phishing victim
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️  WARNING: 80%+ of transfers go to same address - possible phishing victim

metadata.attack_scenario: User repeatedly signing malicious transactions to scammer address

name: Sybil/Bot Wallet Detection
description: Detects suspicious funding patterns indicating sybil attack or bot wallet
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️  WARNING: Suspicious funding pattern detected - likely sybil/bot wallet

metadata.attack_scenario: Coordinated attack using multiple bot wallets funded from same source

name: Compromised AI Agent
description: Detects compromised AI agent via high velocity + high concentration pattern
author: securecheck

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: High velocity + concentration detected - likely compromised AI agent or wallet

metadata.attack_scenario: AI agent keys compromised, attacker rapidly draining to single address

name: High Risk Funding Source
description: Alerts on wallets with high funding risk score (unknown source + recent + small amount)
author: securecheck

rule.message: ⚠️  WARNING: High funding risk score (≥80) - suspicious wallet origin

metadata.attack_scenario: Freshly created wallet with suspicious funding for attack

name: Moderate Transfer Velocity
description: Alerts on elevated transfer velocity (5-10 tx/hour) for monitoring
author: securecheck

rule.message: ℹ️  INFO: Moderate transfer velocity detected (5-10 tx/hour) - monitor for escalation

metadata.attack_scenario: Early stage of potential drain or high-frequency legitimate activity
